title: Multithreaded World Generation System
description: Designed an asynchronous C# world generation system in Godot for scalability. Debugged parallel process stability issues through root cause analysis to ensure consistent execution.

title: Custom Engine Betting Game
description: Developed a data-driven auto-battler from scratch using C# and MonoGame. Architected a custom high-performance engine for 2D rendering and modular gameplay to avoid commercial engine overhead.

title: Scoundrel Daily
description: A web-based port of the roguelike card game 'Scoundrel'. Built with TypeScript and PixiJS for high-performance 2D rendering, bundled with Vite, and hosted on GitHub Pages.

title: Data-Driven Portfolio
description: A high-performance, data-driven portfolio built without frontend frameworks. Features a custom vanilla JS component system, Tailwind CSS, and a Node.js analytics microservice. Self-hosted on a dedicated Linux server and tunneled through Cloudflare.
